name: ListInvoices
description: List invoices with optional filters. You can filter by reference, year and use pagination with from and limit parameters.

reference.description: The invoice reference/number to filter by (e.g., '2024.123456'). This allows you to search for a specific invoice by its reference number.

year.description: Filter invoices by year (e.g., '2024'). This will return all invoices from the specified year.

from_.description: The invoice ID to start retrieving the list from (for pagination). This allows you to paginate through results.

limit.description: The maximum number of invoices to retrieve. Defaults to 50. Maximum value is 250.

sort.description: Sort order for the results. Use 'asc' for ascending (oldest first) or 'desc' for descending (newest first). Defaults to 'desc'.
